landing.title: Imagine, if you will...
landing.text: Tic Tac Toe, but Player 2 gets to decidce where Player 1's first move ends up inside the actual 3x3 Board. Thats it, pretty much.

host.share: Share this Game-Code or Link with your opponent:

connection.title: Connection Error!
connection.description: Could not connect to Server. Please try again later.

overloaded.title: O V E R L O A D E D
overloaded.description: The Server seems to be overloaded at the time. Please try again later.

code.title: Invalid Game-Code
code.description: Could not find a pending Game with that Game-Code.

server.title: Opponent lost connection!
server.description: Your opponent has lost connection to the Server. Looks like you won?

client.title: Opponent quit!
client.description: Your opponent quit the Game. Time to grill them about it! >:D

error.title: Whoopsie daisy ( ° ʖ °)
error.description: Looks like something went wrong. Please try again later.

settings.dataInfoText: The settings are only saved in your Browser. The Server only manages the connection with your opponent while the Game is running and saves no information at all.
